form.formComment: Won two starts back over 312m at this track. Last start she finished last over 312m at this track beaten 2.75 lengths (18.55) behind Clive's Chance in a Grade 3/4 on April 8. Draw likely to suit. Has run blistering time here with a 18.06 PB at the distance. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (23.10) at this track in a Grade 2/3, finishing fourth and beaten 8 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and seven places from 12 starts. Has ability and should be around the money.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (18.57) when fifth over 312m at this track in a OPEN. Yet to win but has placed five times from this draw. Tough field and looking to others this time.
